LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TURO INC., TOMAS VOLEJNICEK'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS DENIED. VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO BECAUSE IT IS THE FIRST-NAMED DEFENDANT'S RESIDENCE. (K.R.L. PARTNERSHIP V. SUP. CT. (2004) 120 CAL.APP.4TH 490, 504.) WITNESSES WILL NOT BE SIGNIFICANTLY INCONVENIENCED, AS SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN MATEO COUNTIES ARE CONTIGUOUS, NOT REMOTE FROM ONE ANOTHER. I JUDICIALLY NOTE THAT MANY PEOPLE DAILY COMMUTE BETWEEN THE TWO COUNTIES. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHRAD B. ULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George V. Choulos, Esq., Choulos, Choulos & Wyle, Telephone 415-432-7299, appearing for Plaintiff;
Miguel Saldana, Esq., Gordon & Reese, Telephone 415-875-4302, appearing for Defendant TuroInc., et al;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TURO INC., TOMAS VOLEJNICEK's Motion To Change Venue.

Defendants' motion to change venue is DENIED. Venue is proper in San Francisco because it is the first-named defendant's residence. (K.R.L. Partnership v. Sup. Ct. (2004) 120 Cal.App.4th 490, 504.) Witnesses will not be significantly inconvenienced, as San Francisco and San Mateo counties are contiguous, not remote from one another. I judicially note that many people daily commute between the two counties.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richrad B. Ulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
